MR LAW CONSULTANCY

Resolution Driven

We provide tailored legal advisory services fit for client's needs pertaining to employment relations, delictual claims, insurance law, matrimonial disputes, and contractual matters.

Schedule ConsultationOur Services

About Us

Our Philosophy

Our strategic approach is the prioritization of resolution over high-cost and prolonged litigation. We believe that the best legal outcomes are achieved when disputes are resolved efficiently and amicably.

In considering the influx of legal disputes at the courts and tribunals, we aim at assisting clients to resolve their disputes amicably by negotiating favourable settlement terms, minimizing legal costs, and sparing our clients the hostility of prolonged years of litigation.

We conduct an objective assessment of the prospects of success to assist our clients in making an informed decision whether to pursue litigation, settle, or defend a matter.

“Justice is not about winning at all costs — it's about finding the right resolution.”
— MR LAW CONSULTANCY

Objective Assessment

Clear evaluation of prospects before any action

Cost Protection

Minimize legal expenses through strategic resolution

Network Access

High-calibre attorney referrals at discounted rates

Our Practice Areas

Legal Services

We provide tailored legal advisory services designed to meet your specific needs and achieve favourable outcomes.

Employment Relations

Comprehensive advisory on workplace disputes, unfair dismissal claims, disciplinary proceedings, and employment contract matters.

  • Unfair dismissal
  • Disciplinary hearings
  • Employment contracts
  • CCMA referrals

Delictual Claims

Expert guidance on civil wrongs causing harm, including negligence claims, personal injury matters, and damages assessments.

  • Negligence claims
  • Personal injury
  • Damages assessment
  • Third-party claims

Insurance Law

Specialized advice on policy interpretation, claim disputes, and coverage matters for both insurers and policyholders.

  • Policy interpretation
  • Claim disputes
  • Coverage analysis
  • Bad faith claims

Matrimonial Disputes

Sensitive handling of family law matters including divorce proceedings, maintenance disputes, and settlement negotiations.

  • Divorce proceedings
  • Maintenance disputes
  • Settlement agreements
  • Property division

Contractual Matters

Drafting, review, and advisory on commercial agreements, breach of contract disputes, and enforcement actions.

  • Contract drafting
  • Breach disputes
  • Agreement review
  • Enforcement actions

Dispute Resolution

Strategic negotiation and mediation services to resolve conflicts without the need for costly court proceedings.

  • Mediation
  • Negotiation
  • Settlement facilitation
  • Arbitration support

Our Process

How We Work

After a careful assessment of the matters and attempts at dispute resolution, when it is deemed plausible to refer the matter to court, we assist our clients in referring the case to high-calibre attorneys at a discounted rate.

01

Initial Consultation

We meet to understand your situation, gather facts, and identify your objectives.

02

Objective Assessment

We analyze the merits of your case and provide an honest evaluation of your prospects.

03

Strategic Resolution

We pursue negotiation and settlement options to achieve a favourable outcome efficiently.

04

Litigation Support

If court action is necessary, we refer you to high-calibre attorneys at discounted rates.

Our Services Include

  • Legal advisory on complex matters
  • Drafting of legal opinions
  • Contract drafting and review
  • Negotiations and settlements
  • Risk management consultation
  • Attorney referral services
“We believe that prevention and early resolutionserve our clients better than prolonged conflict.”
